title: [FIRRTL] Performance problem of Firtool 1.62.1
body:
[good.fir.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/20664436/good.fir.gz)
[bad.fir.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/20664437/bad.fir.gz)

I used firtool 1.62.1 to conpile these .fir files generated from Chisel 6.7.0, but it took abnormally long run time. For firtool 1.62.1 is the recommended firtool of Chisel 6.x, we need a fix for this problem. The problem is originally reported in #8441 .

```
gzip -d good.fir.gz
firtool good.fir --format=fir -o good.sv --disable-annotation-unknown --verilog # complete in about 40 seconds
```
```
gzip -d bad.fir.gz
firtool bad.fir --format=fir -o bad.sv --disable-annotation-unknown --verilog # complete in about 20 minutes
```
code_blocks:
gzip -d good.fir.gz
firtool good.fir --format=fir -o good.sv --disable-annotation-unknown --verilog # complete in about 40 seconds
gzip -d bad.fir.gz
firtool bad.fir --format=fir -o bad.sv --disable-annotation-unknown --verilog # complete in about 20 minutes
